field_objectives.label: Bramble Screen
field_objectives.summary: The thorn-choked berm lets the grove raiders fire from cover and keeps the hexer screened until the bank is stormed.

field_objectives.label: Gate Breach
field_objectives.summary: The side that controls the broken gate controls whether the assault stalls at the wall or spills into the yard.

field_objectives.label: Levee Stake Choke
field_objectives.summary: The levee stakes keep the bank tight and bleed momentum until the barrier is ripped apart.

field_objectives.label: Chain Slinger Lane
field_objectives.summary: The ferry-chain slingers keep the open lane murderous until the bank is stormed.

field_objectives.label: Levee Break
field_objectives.summary: Whoever forces the levee break controls the late melee collapse.

field_objectives.label: Drum Circle Pylon
field_objectives.summary: The shrine drums keep stealing tempo until the pylon ring is broken.

field_objectives.label: Silt Sink
field_objectives.summary: The drowned lane keeps chewing cohesion unless the safer footing is seized.

field_objectives.label: Lantern Kill Lane
field_objectives.summary: The patrol's lantern battery keeps the road under ranged pressure until the rise is taken.

field_objectives.label: Road Signal Beacon
field_objectives.summary: A signal mast keeps command steadier and makes the battery harder to break.

field_objectives.label: Charter Pike Gate
field_objectives.summary: The charter pike gate keeps the assault compressed until the barrier line is forced open.

field_objectives.label: Charter Supply Post
field_objectives.summary: Fresh reserves and steadier shields flow through the charter supply post.

field_objectives.label: Bastion Signal Mast
field_objectives.summary: The bastion signal mast keeps the reserve line coordinated under pressure.

field_objectives.label: Reed Totem Ring
field_objectives.summary: The totem ring keeps beating on the line's cohesion until the circle is broken.

field_objectives.label: Fen Hazard Lane
field_objectives.summary: The soaked reeds punish the side that fails to take the firmer bank.

field_objectives.label: Bone Rack Blind
field_objectives.summary: The ferry's rackwork blinds keep the watchers screened while they rake the lane from cover.

field_objectives.label: Ferry Chain Choke
field_objectives.summary: The dropped ferry chains keep the causeway clogged until the choke is hacked clear.

field_objectives.label: Bridge Barricade
field_objectives.summary: The bridge barricade keeps the crossing narrow until the levy wall is broken apart.

field_objectives.label: Lens Bulwark
field_objectives.summary: The mirrored lens bulwark keeps the pickets screened while the relay crews hold the firing line.

field_objectives.label: Relay Kill Lane
field_objectives.summary: The mirrored relay lane magnifies ranged pressure until the lens crews are displaced.

field_objectives.label: Relay Signal Beacon
field_objectives.summary: A relay beacon keeps the firing line synchronized and command harder to expose.

field_objectives.label: Prism Shelter Line
field_objectives.summary: The prism shelters keep the matrix crews screened while the arrays hold the long lane.

field_objectives.label: Daybreak Kill Lane
field_objectives.summary: The matrix arrays keep the approach under concentrated battery fire until the lane is turned.

field_objectives.label: Array Relay Depot
field_objectives.summary: The relay depot feeds fresh crews and steadier reserves into the matrix line.

field_objectives.label: Daybreak Beacon
field_objectives.summary: The daybreak beacon keeps the arrays synchronized and command tempo protected.

field_objectives.label: Toll Stores
field_objectives.summary: The lodge keeps spare shafts, bolts, and pay chests behind the front line until the yard is secured.

field_objectives.label: Kennel Run
field_objectives.summary: The kennel run gives the hounds a clean rush lane until the firmer ground is taken.

field_objectives.label: Wind Perch
field_objectives.summary: The high perch keeps the roost crews coordinated until the approach ridge is taken.

field_objectives.label: Barge Stores
field_objectives.summary: Spare poles, nets, and lamp oil keep the mooring defenders supplied until the dock is secured.

field_objectives.label: Spore Beds
field_objectives.summary: The glowing beds make the tunnel approach treacherous until the crop rows are controlled.

field_objectives.label: Repair Pile
field_objectives.summary: The repair pile feeds spare blades and bow arms into the watch until the yard is claimed.

field_objectives.label: Hot Kiln Yard
field_objectives.summary: Open furnace trenches punish a rushed assault until the kiln yard is taken.

field_objectives.label: Storm Beacon
field_objectives.summary: The storm beacon keeps the bothy watch coordinated across the white road.

field_objectives.label: Orchard Stores
field_objectives.summary: Food stores and tool sheds let the levy keep rotating fresh crews into the lane.

field_objectives.label: Bramble Screen
field_objectives.summary: The screen hides hedge fighters until the thorn line is pushed back.

field_objectives.label: Skiff Racks
field_objectives.summary: Boat racks and tide marks keep the skiffyard crews moving until the beach is held.

field_objectives.label: Guide Stores
field_objectives.summary: Guide ropes and packed stores let the hostel watch hold the switchback longer than expected.

field_objectives.label: Blinding Flats
field_objectives.summary: White flats and salt glare keep attackers exposed until the camp center is taken.

field_objectives.label: Crystal Choke
field_objectives.summary: Reflective stone breaks sight lines and protects the sump defenders until the choke is cleared.

field_objectives.label: Snare Line
field_objectives.summary: Hidden snare lines break a careless approach until the lodge path is found.

field_objectives.label: Glass Scar
field_objectives.summary: Knife-edged scar glass narrows the approach and protects the camp line.

field_objectives.label: Coppice Screen
field_objectives.summary: Layered coppice rows hide the copse watch until the trail center is held.

field_objectives.label: Flaremast
field_objectives.summary: The flaremast lets pilots coordinate beach routes until the house is secured.

field_objectives.label: Kite Mast
field_objectives.summary: Signal kites keep the eyrie watch moving faster until the mast is grounded.

field_objectives.label: Oil Niche
field_objectives.summary: Lamp oil and needle stores keep the warren watch effective until the niche is taken.

field_objectives.label: Bell Path
field_objectives.summary: Bell-marked mud lanes confuse the approach until the croft center is held.

field_objectives.label: Milestone Stores
field_objectives.summary: The arsenal storeyard keeps spare bucklers and cartbows flowing until the milestone is claimed.

field_objectives.label: Iced Wharf
field_objectives.summary: Iced planks and signal lamps let the wharf guard keep its footing until the house is held.

field_objectives.label: Coal Clamp
field_objectives.summary: Smoking coal clamps make the center lane dangerous until the camp is scattered.

field_objectives.label: Basalt Gate
field_objectives.summary: The gate throat turns every approach into a narrow breach until the custodians are broken.

field_objectives.label: Bramble Gate
field_objectives.summary: Root screens make the lane hard to read until the gate line is forced open.

field_objectives.label: Tally Post
field_objectives.summary: Contract ledgers keep the foundry line supplied until the post is seized.

field_objectives.label: Fog Bell
field_objectives.summary: The harbor bell hides privateer movement until the signal frame is claimed.
